creator: alex@foxybanana.com
text:
- Please repocopy www/py-cherrypy -> www/py-cherrypy-old
- www/py-turbogears does not work with the version of cherrypy in ports
  Details here: http://groups.google.com.ar/group/turbogears/browse_thread/thread/5c3f59e421b3534a/9d2466a763cc97ec

Included is a patch again py-cherrypy to downgrade it to a working version.
